PLIC

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0xc000000
Size:
0x200008
Source:
plic_rf.rdl

Description

Platform-Level Interrupt Controller. SiFive E31 PLIC supporting 127 global interrupt sources with 7 priority levels. Single hart (Hart 0), M-Mode only. Complies with the RISC-V Privileged Architecture spec. Only aligned 32-bit accesses are supported. Interrupt source 0 is unused; usable IDs are 1-127.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x000000 priority[128] Interrupt Source Priority
0x000200 - -
0x001000 pending[4] Interrupt Pending
0x001010 - -
0x002000 enable[4] Interrupt Enable
0x002010 - -
0x200000 threshold Priority Threshold
0x200004 claim_complete Interrupt Claim/Complete
